subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, Thou art the Sovereign of the heavens and of the earth and their Creator, and the King of the dominion of command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم انک انت سلطان السموات و الارض و خالقهم و ملیک جبروت الامر و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
